## Description / 描述

<!-- A clear and concise description of the changes / 简洁清晰地描述本次变更 -->

## Type of Change / 变更类型

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Test update
- [ ] Configuration change

## Related Issues / 关联 Issue

<!-- Link related issues: Fixes #123, Closes #456 / 关联 Issue -->

## Checklist / 检查清单

- [ ] My code follows the project's code style / 我的代码遵循项目代码规范
- [ ] I have performed a self-review / 我已进行自我审查
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective / 我已添加测试证明修复有效
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass / 所有新旧测试通过
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly / 我已相应更新文档

## Testing / 测试

<!-- How has this been tested? / 如何测试的？ -->

- [ ] Unit tests pass (`npx vitest run`)
- [ ] Manual testing performed

## Screenshots / 截图

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots / 如果适用，添加截图 -->
